omitted_declarations.policy_reference: • Categories of Personal Information Collected/Disclosed: In the preceding 12 months, we may have collected and disclosed for a business purpose (and potentially "sold” or “shared” for advertising purposes) the categories of personal information listed in Section 1 (Identifiers like name, email, device ID, IP address, Advertising ID; Internet or other electronic network activity information like usage data; Geolocation data; Commercial information like transaction history if applicable; Profile data like preferences).
